title: Web AI Ask Infrastructure: Pump, CDP Worker, Editor Send Paths
desc: Architecture of the page-side JS pump worker and C# orchestration layer for sending prompts to web AI (Claude/GPT/Gemini). Each AI has a different editor type and send path.
steps: 1. [PUMP ARCHITECTURE] window.__wkAskPump is a singleton JS object injected into each AI tab via CDP Runtime.evaluate. It runs a setInterval(500ms) ticker per editor selector. Content hash tracked per tick: change -> reset ticks; stable for 2 ticks (1s) -> trySend(). C# side: CdpPromptPump.cs wraps append+arm+watchdog.
author: claude
